title: Crashers Vanity Equipment
description: The vanity equipment pack is a resource pack utilizing Optifine's name-dependent textures, allowing you to rename items using an anvil to change their appearance. The pack has a growing list of designs that can be applied to armor, tools, and more.
body:
[

![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/026201561576dffe9c021d2941061262797cee60.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/crasher120/projects)[![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e009480f2af8c79e3ea4e398338cae87e9ff8c31.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/Crasher120)[![BlueSky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f95aae0aa5dfa831a8022918c7b01becf079bbf6.png)](https://bsky.app/profile/crasher120.bsky.social)[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a7cde82586b398a24a306fc4948f278f877ae1e.png)

](https://discord.gg/RxhH3zTsjB) ![vanity equipment ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a353f68975aeaaa12ce3987d4c17093148d35aae.png) ### Crashers Vanity Equipment The vanity equipment pack is a resource pack utilizing optifine's name-dependent textures. Using an anvil, you just rename your item to change its appearance! I've chosen to focus on applying these unique textures to Netherite equipment to ensure you don't have to compromise your items strength for a specific look. Additionally, the pack also contains designs for miscellaneous items like bows, fishing rods, shields, and Elytras. For a comprehensive list of options, and instructions on how to use the pack visit the discord [Here](https://discord.gg/RxhH3zTsjB) ### Enjoy exploring the pack! ![Emerald](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vk6BRHxg/images/4d5830973bfdfbc85805c9dd963229cefbd47a0c.png) ![Amethyst](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vk6BRHxg/images/059f25029dc98952a7ee02fa461f6d5b1e2ab9ff.png) ![Prismarine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vk6BRHxg/images/3bb06bf08cf1292eb520d2927cdd33b539fa6d74.png)
